programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: The Friend

programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. programme.title: Quadrophenia

He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: Oldboy
programme.desc: Dae-Su is an obnoxious drunk bailed from the police station yet again by a friend. However, hes abducted from the street and wakes up in a cell, where he remains for the next 15 years, drugged unconscious when human contact is unavoidable, otherwise with only the television as company. And then, suddenly released, he is invited to track down his jailor with a denouement that is simply stunning.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In 2274, computers rule a hermetically sealed city housing the survivors of a holocaust that has decimated the earth. Life is hedonistic and happy for the citys inhabitants; unfortunately they must be terminated when they reach 30. When Logan 5, a trained hunter for the system, grows intrigued by a beautiful young woman, he is forced to question the fundamental principles of his society and decides he must flee.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: A drought-devastated farmer is desperate for money and, for $200, agrees to guard a notorious outlaw until the train comes to take him to jail. However, the farmer has not reckoned on his prisoners psychological wiles and must resist manipulative strategies aimed at permitting him to escape.

programme.title: Maggie Moore(s)
programme.desc: Police Chief Sanders unravels a web of small-town lies while investigating the bizarre murders of two women with the same name. He meets and quickly falls for Rita, a nosy neighbour whos eager to help solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Ali meets a mysterious man who claims to be the father of her teenage daughter, Katie. What begins as an unsettling encounter soon spirals into a nightmare of long-buried secrets, lies and obsession.

programme.title: Restless
programme.desc: A middle-aged empty nesters mundane life is upended when raucous new neighbours move in next door, unleashing potential danger and disruption.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: While driving with his two kids, a man receives a phone call from an unknown assailant who claims there is a bomb in the car. Unable to exit the vehicle, he must now follow a series of twisted instructions while trying to figure out how to survive.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers
programme.desc: A troubled female cop must unravel the perfect murder as she matches wits with two homicidal schoolboys, who believe they cant be caught after committing a motiveless crime. As she gets ever closer to the truth she at once alienates her new partner and puts her own life in peril.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A driven young man named Lou stumbles upon the underground world of Los Angeles freelance crime journalism.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original groups way of life.

programme.title: Oceans Thirteen
programme.desc: The remaining members of Danny Oceans gang regroup to jeopardise the nefarious plans of a businessman who double-crossed one of Dannys old friends. The team plan to ruin the opening of his glitzy Las Vegas casino and hotel by rigging the games and ensuring that every punter goes home with a jackpot.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider
programme.desc: A detective and a Secret Service agent investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: The Bikeriders

programme.title: Taxi Driver

Unable to sleep night after night, Travis haunts the local pornography emporiums to find diversion.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tonys walk takes him back to 1940 when the sleepy county of Dorset became the frontline in the war against Hitler. programme.desc: Fearless: In the land down under, each moment is a battle for survival. To see another day, animals must be bold, courageous and totally fearless.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Tenacious: Wallabies bravely scale the terrain and Turkey Dads defend their nests. They prove that having a tenacious attitude is the key to overcoming the odds.

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Sharks are among the planets oldest and most highly evolved predators. Along southern Africas coast, pioneers dedicate their lives to learning more about these creatures, and spreading awareness about their plight.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: When a tiny fawn gets hit by a car, Dr Jessica must splint its broken leg or it may never return to the wild. A mother porcupine arrives with baby in tow and a parasitic infection.

programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Reptiles have conquered just about every habitat and have evolved a remarkable array of adaptations, making them the undisputed masters of the underworld.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Just as Hope is scrambling to get ready for her busiest day of the year, the government comes to seize the bear cub that Hope has worked so hard to save.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The coast of Mozambique is known for its giants: from the humpbacks that visit each winter, to the resident whale sharks that feed there year-round. But a closer look reveals a secretive world of tiny species that few have explored. Often overlooked, they are just as important to the ecosystems that they inhabit. On this wild and unpredictable coast, marine scientists work against the clock to protect Mozambiques smallest creatures, before its too late.

programme.title: Ningaloo: Australias Ocean Wonder
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: When a category two hurricane slams the rehab centre, Hope and her team struggle to protect their patients in the middle of the storm.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The ocean sprawls across 70 percent of the planet and is home to as many as one million known species of plants and animals. However, it is the smallest of ocean creatures that underpins the worlds largest food web, plankton. These microscopic organisms drift through the oceans diverse habitats, triggering feeding cycles in their wake. Without them, life in the ocean would cease to exist.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn go down a copper mine, just a few hundred yards from their cottage, which was once the major source of Morwhellam Quays wealth. Historian Ruth Goodman learns the art of lace-making, visiting the town of Honiton which became world famous for its lace. The boys also go tin mining in Cornwall, an industry which survived until the end of the 20th century.

programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and team visit Hull to transform the garden of Macmillan nurse Maggie Simkiss, who cares for patients at the end of their lives, treating their emotional wellbeing as well as their medical needs. Outside work she is equally devoted to charities and also looks after her grandchildren, so her garden has been neglected.

programme.desc: Comedian and presenter Judi Love has asked Zuu to prepare her a slap-up meal for after her appearance on Loose Women.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu takes his food truck to Croydon to meet with Jimmy Carr and cook his ultimate meal ready for when he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are back on the road heading to Cardiff to cook for American stand-up and actor Desiree Burch. Shes in the Welsh capital with her new show Desirees Coming Early.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu ventures into the unknown - travelling from his native West London, all the way to Hackney in East London to cook for comedian Jamali Maddix.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are going international flying all the way to the Isle of Man to cook for comedian Josh Widdicombe on his Bit Much tour.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is in Londons West End, Soho, to cook for the comedian London Hughes. London has high standards, so Zuu will have to be on the top of his game!

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Jacob Anderson has asked Zuu to cook him a special meal while he performs at Londons Indigo at the O2 venue.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu, Tubsey and Hyder cook for Rose Matafeo, who wants the boys to cook her a post work-out feast.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan is preparing to try out some new material at a South London venue so Zuu pulls out out all the stops to provide him with the ultimate post-gig meal.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime star and chef Big Zuu returns to his West London roots to meet with comedian and presenter Mel Giedroyc.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu meets American actor and comedian Rob Delaney and agrees to cook him a bespoke meal that combines all his favourite foods.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu meets comic actor Natasia Demetriou at an allotment in West London she discusses all her favourite foods and asks Zuu to come up with her perfect meal.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: King of chat Jonathan Ross is invited to be a guest on Big Zuus very own studio chat show in the manor and receives a dining experience that hell never forget.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Roisin Conaty - inspired by her love of cinema snacks, she is treated to a private screening where the food is the star of the show.

programme.desc: Zuu pulls off an epic cook as he welcomes Sir Mo Farah, who takes the boys on in the Mandem Olympics and is treated to a supersized dining experience as his reward.

programme.desc: Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Ellie Taylor to Mandem HQ and give her a BandB-style breakfast buffet with a Peking duck twist - its a dish she wont forget in a hurry...

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedic crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores an old landmark in Liberia with surprising American origins, the desolate town of Doel in Belgium, a Bolivian ski resort, and a pioneering scientific structure in Cleveland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores the Dew Drop Inn in New Orleans, a music mecca that paid the price for taking on the authorities. Also explores Belgica Fort, a stronghold constructed to guard the most unlikely of treasures.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave picks up a 1970s Alfa Romeo that once starred in a chocolate advert. Meanwhile, Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV before becoming distracted by a treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to acquire some vintage motorcycles from a collection in a garage at the bottom of a garden in the North East. Meanwhile, Paul tries to bag a 1955 Ford Zephyr convertible.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Meanwhile, Derek has his work cut out in Yorkshire trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting a precarious garage roof.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta, Dave handles a rare Ford Granada rally support vehicle, and Paul contends with a Hilux monster truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he collects an immaculate Citroen that was once used by the Gestapo in occupied France, Dave considers spending his own money on a hay cart, and Paul unearths a remarkably rust-free 1970s Alfa GTV.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family continue their pursuit of classic cars. In the home counties, Derek picks up two expertly crafted replicas of the batmobile. Meanwhile, Dave struggles to contain his enthusiasm for a Second World War Ford jeep.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul picks up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, Dave drools over a Ford Sierra Sapphire Cosworth, and Derek refuses a test drive in the worlds smallest production car, the 3.5 horsepower Peel P50.

programme.desc: Derek inspects a collection of old police cars that includes a Rover P6 complete with radio, sirens and V8 engine. Meanwhile, Paul tries to figure out who will buy an old 1975 Range Rover that has been converted into a fire engine.

programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to collect a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock. Meanwhile, Dave enjoys the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravalle.

programme.sub-title: Nugget, Tetley and the Police Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets Chow Chow Nugget who has a longer stay than planned, three-legged Tetley, and some Belgian Malinois puppies training to be service dogs.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Thirty-five-year-old career woman Charlene is struggling to come to terms with the fact that shes about to become a mum. Charlenes mum Marion and Aunt Bev use Liverpudlian humour to help her through the final stages of labour.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: After giving up on men, 34-year-old beautician Maria unexpectedly fell for her builder, David. Lifes plan seems to finally be coming together, but some worrying news about their unborn baby puts their life on hold.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Responders rush to the scene of a chemical attack at the Consulate General of Argentina, and a frightening electrical storm sets the city on fire.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Its the biggest shift of the year on New Years Eve, and the responders deal with overzealous celebrations, a violent mental health case, and a 102-year-old ladies man.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Under the Knife
programme.desc: Louis Theroux pulls back the folds of plastic America and gets under the skin of the plastic surgery patients that crowd the clinics of Beverly Hills. Louis becomes a part of the plastic surgeons daily lives, joining them for their consultations and operations in the search for everlasting youth. As Louis tries to understand these motivations, he wonders if he too might be a candidate for a nip tuck.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Lagos
programme.desc: Louis Theroux is in Lagos, following the local gangs, the so-called Area Boys, as they patrol their turf, clash with local rivals and keep the peace in a brutal and haphazard fashion. He gets to know the rich and glamorous Area Boy leader MC, a former street youth himself. On the side of the law, Louis rides with KAI, the governments Kick Against Indiscipline paramilitary task force.

programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Matt Baker, Gyles Brandreth, Maggie Aderin-Pocock, HRVY, Grace Dent, Laura Whitmore and Mr Motivator try to help three contestants win life-changing cash.

programme.desc: Louis Theroux joins the Philadelphia Police Department patrolling the most dangerous part of one of the most violent cities in America. Louis senses a society trying to contain a lawlessness born out of poverty and disaffection. Over time he sees a complex picture evolve - there are cops and robbers, guns and violence, but also an understanding between both sides.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Nugget, Tetley and the Police Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets Chow Chow Nugget who has a longer stay than planned, three-legged Tetley, and some Belgian Malinois puppies training to be service dogs.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Thirty-five-year-old career woman Charlene is struggling to come to terms with the fact that shes about to become a mum. Charlenes mum Marion and Aunt Bev use Liverpudlian humour to help her through the final stages of labour.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: After giving up on men, 34-year-old beautician Maria unexpectedly fell for her builder, David. Lifes plan seems to finally be coming together, but some worrying news about their unborn baby puts their life on hold.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Responders rush to the scene of a chemical attack at the Consulate General of Argentina, and a frightening electrical storm sets the city on fire.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Its the biggest shift of the year on New Years Eve, and the responders deal with overzealous celebrations, a violent mental health case, and a 102-year-old ladies man.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Under the Knife
programme.desc: Louis Theroux pulls back the folds of plastic America and gets under the skin of the plastic surgery patients that crowd the clinics of Beverly Hills. Louis becomes a part of the plastic surgeons daily lives, joining them for their consultations and operations in the search for everlasting youth. As Louis tries to understand these motivations, he wonders if he too might be a candidate for a nip tuck.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Lagos
programme.desc: Louis Theroux is in Lagos, following the local gangs, the so-called Area Boys, as they patrol their turf, clash with local rivals and keep the peace in a brutal and haphazard fashion. He gets to know the rich and glamorous Area Boy leader MC, a former street youth himself. On the side of the law, Louis rides with KAI, the governments Kick Against Indiscipline paramilitary task force.

programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Matt Baker, Gyles Brandreth, Maggie Aderin-Pocock, HRVY, Grace Dent, Laura Whitmore and Mr Motivator try to help three contestants win life-changing cash.

programme.desc: Kevin and Suzanne are desperate to move their family out of a rental property into a new home.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Keira, a dog on the brink of starvation, and gentle old Jack Russell Paige, whose owner had to make the heartbreaking decision to give her up after 15 years.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Lasalles brother, Cade, needs the teams help when he becomes a murder suspect, and cannot remember what happened; Lasalle is determined to prove Cades innocence, despite the wealth of evidence against him.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: How Much Pain Can You Take
programme.desc: Baitfish murders a person close to the team in order to send a message to Pride; a citywide hunt for the elusive criminal takes place.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.sub-title: A Giant Gun, Filled With Drugs
programme.desc: Sherlock tries to find out who kidnapped the adult daughter of his ex-drug dealer, Rhys. Watson worries about Sherlocks sobriety when Rhys suggests Sherlock was a better detective when he was using drugs.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: A record heat wave has the city at boiling point, and officers respond to reports of a woman assaulted by her partner.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics are sent to help a 49-year-old who has fallen in the street after a night out in Stoke, while in Dudley, paramedics visit a 5-month-old who has a temperature and isnt drinking.

programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Harry Redknapp, Carol Vorderman, Nick Grimshaw, Andi Oliver, Tom Read Wilson, Angela Scanlon and Chunkz try to help this weeks players win a fortune.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Guided by his Appletons and tracing the footsteps of the Pilgrim Fathers, Michael Portillo heads for Plymouth, the `home town of America. He learns how indigenous tribes of Wamponoag people taught newly arrived settlers to live off the land, inspiring one of the biggest holidays in todays American calendar.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his Appletons guide, Michael Portillo continues his rail journey through Connecticut and New England. He takes a crash course in rowing in New Haven, where college teams from Yale and Harvard have battled for victory on the water since 1852. In Vermont, Michael visits a 19th-century farm, where the rich milk from prized Jersey cows imported from the British Isles supplied a thriving butter industry.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to acquire some vintage motorcycles from a collection in a garage at the bottom of a garden in the North East. Meanwhile, Paul tries to bag a 1955 Ford Zephyr convertible.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds two rare Fiats and a VW Corrado. Meanwhile, Derek has his work cut out in Yorkshire trying to remove an old Morris that appears to be supporting a precarious garage roof.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: How the Americans, once they were provoked into war, out-produced the rest of the world so quickly and by such a huge margin, including the likes of General Motors.

programme.title: The Great War in Numbers
programme.desc: Hear about the effect of World War I on the domestic front.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The picturesque location is Queen Victorias favourite seaside residence, Osborne. As the experts set up their tables overlooking the grand gardens with views of The Solent, visitors bring along treasures including some ordinary looking cutlery with a special mark. Other surprises include a globe-trotting trunk, a chair with a moving story behind it and a beautiful Japanese jar found in a water tank.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The show comes from Floors Castle in Scotland where a piece of Robert Burns memorabilia steals the scene, a glorious diamond pendant sets pulses racing and a jade figurine isnt quite what it seems.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasnt seen the light of day in thirty years.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: How the Americans, once they were provoked into war, out-produced the rest of the world so quickly and by such a huge margin, including the likes of General Motors.

programme.title: The Great War in Numbers

Other surprises include a globe-trotting trunk, a chair with a moving story behind it and a beautiful Japanese jar found in a water tank.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey on the remote Caribbean coast of Nicaragua, travels to the beautiful Honduran island of Roatán and encounters extreme violence on the mainland of Honduras before finishing his adventure on the iconic island of Jamaica.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the teams most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Lotus Carlton Turbo; TR7 Special Edition
programme.desc: Dereks winging his way to Bingley to meet a kindred spirit whos parting with his TR7 after 32 years. Paul and Charlie head to Anglesey to collect a pair of Lotuss.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasnt seen the light of day in thirty years.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a military strong-hold in the Philippines, a facility that spawned an American sporting great, and an English relic that hosted a cinematic sensation.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a ruined castle above a German village, a rural town in Idaho, a futuristic skyscraper in Johannesburg and a fantasy world outside of Buenos Aires.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: How the Americans, once they were provoked into war, out-produced the rest of the world so quickly and by such a huge margin, including the likes of General Motors.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: In the vibrant metropolis of Montreal, Michael discovers how French and British colonial roots have influenced the citys construction, cuisine and culture. Undaunted by his guidebooks description of the treacherous Lachine Rapids, he gets a thorough soaking on a white-knuckle boat ride down the St Lawrence River.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Steered by his 1899 Appletons guide, Michael Portillos rail journey through eastern Canada continues along the Grand Trunk railway, following the route of the St Lawrence River. At Brockville, he leaves the tracks for a nautical pilgrimage through the beautiful Thousand Islands. In the port city of Kingston, Ontario, Michael visits Fort Henry and, dressed for the occasion, is entrusted to fire the naval guns that protected the nations southern border during the 19th century.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta, Dave handles a rare Ford Granada rally support vehicle, and Paul contends with a Hilux monster truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a long drive in a 1960s bus that has had a life in the sun, Dave helps a collector trim his fleet of British classics by taking a Triumph TR7 convertible for auction, and Paul is confused by an agricultural Bonser truck.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: Henry Fords plan, with the help of Albert Kahn, to build a giant factory in Michigan, covering 3.5million sq ft and including an aircraft production line half a mile in length.

programme.title: The Great War in Numbers
programme.desc: Illuminating statistics help to show how, after 1916, the imperial powers redoubled their efforts to win the war.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the iconic castle of the Welsh capital city of Cardiff. The castle grounds provide the perfect setting for a journey into the past, with treasures ranging from a simple pottery jug given as a love token, to an early Hockney print found in a junk shop. The star of the day must be an early draft score of Elgars Enigma Variations, signed by the composer.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Minehead Railway Station where spirits are high despite the weather. As the sun breaks through, the treasures begin to arrive, including a chair said to have belonged to Henry VIII and a Butlins dance trophy. The day produces some eclectic finds: a 19th-century washing machine, a historic wedding dress worn by seven brides and counting, plus an exquisite miniature of Napoleon which is guaranteed to create a bidding war among collectors.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres Hollywood glamour in the air as Derek heads out to pick up a Rolls Royce that once belonged to Fred Astaire.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the rare chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.desc: Henry Fords plan, with the help of Albert Kahn, to build a giant factory in Michigan, covering 3.5million sq ft and including an aircraft production line half a mile in length.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey in the south of Ireland, para-motoring with an Irish explorer. On the west coast he does spot of surfing, before climbing Croagh Patrick in honour of Irelands patron saint. This leg of his journey ends in Malin Head, Irelands most northerly point.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek points the team towards one of his favourite motors - a 1983 Daimler Double Six. And a Triumph 2000 is given a modern day makeover under the bonnet.

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina.

programme.desc: Exploring a British fort that became a bizzare zoo, a brutalist school for Communist top brass and a lost world hides secrets of a vanished people.

programme.desc: Simon begins his journey in the south of Ireland, para-motoring with an Irish explorer. On the west coast he does spot of surfing, before climbing Croagh Patrick in honour of Irelands patron saint. This leg of his journey ends in Malin Head, Irelands most northerly point.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek points the team towards one of his favourite motors - a 1983 Daimler Double Six. And a Triumph 2000 is given a modern day makeover under the bonnet.

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres Hollywood glamour in the air as Derek heads out to pick up a Rolls Royce that once belonged to Fred Astaire.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the rare chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a British fort that became a bizzare zoo, a brutalist school for Communist top brass and a lost world hides secrets of a vanished people.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a resort in Argentina, a Greek palace above a Mexican city and a former hotel in Hawaii.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: Henry Fords plan, with the help of Albert Kahn, to build a giant factory in Michigan, covering 3.5million sq ft and including an aircraft production line half a mile in length.

programme.desc: As part of his final gift to Radha, Krishna makes an emotional declaration. Later, Ayan instigates the people of Barsana to dethrone Radha.

programme.title: Ishq

programme.title: Hum Do Humare Do
programme.desc: An orphan mans life takes a hilarious turn when he decides to hire a duo, who share a past, to fake being his parents in an attempt to fulfil his lovers wish of marrying someone with a family.

programme.title: Kapoor and Sons
programme.desc: Brothers Arjun and Rahul return home to visit their ailing grandfather. Amidst numerous ongoing family problems, emotions get intensified when a girl causes a rift between the two.

programme.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
programme.desc: A man struggles to win over members of his girlfriends family, who all want her to marry someone else.

programme.title: Jolly LLB 2
programme.desc: A lawyer hoodwinks a woman to start his own law firm. However, he feels guilty after he finds out that she committed suicide and her husband was a victim of injustice and tries to make things right.

programme.title: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba
programme.desc: Poojas son becomes seriously ill and does not respond to any medication. In Sai Baba, her son regains consciousness for a short while and demands that he be taken to Shirdi.

programme.title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
programme.desc: Sintu, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?

programme.title: Tadka
programme.desc: Seasoned with the right amount of spice and oodles of cuteness, an unintended romance unfolds between a radio jockey and a middle-aged archaeologist, with food playing Cupid.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: A young mute girl from Pakistan loses herself in India with no way to head back. A devoted man with a magnanimous spirit undertakes the task to get her back to her motherland and unite her with her family.

programme.title: Darlings
programme.desc: Badru hopes her volatile husband will reform if he stops drinking. However, when his rage goes too far, she and her mum boldly, albeit clumsily, seek revenge.

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: An accident changes a womans life forever when she is given the gift of being able to see the future in her dreams. She soon realises that she is predicting the path of a serial killer.
